checks.description: Account balances and credit limits calculated correctly
checks.details: BigDecimal used for all monetary fields. Credit limit validation prevents negative values. Balance calculations match COBOL PIC S9(10)V99 precision with sign handling

checks.description: Account updates are atomic and preserve data consistency
checks.details: JPA transaction management ensures atomicity. Optimistic locking prevents concurrent update conflicts. All 15 account fields preserved through update cycle

checks.description: Account updates require authentication and authorization
checks.details: JWT authentication required. Account-scoped authorization prevents cross-account modifications. Audit trail logged for all updates

checks.description: Account update behavior matches COBOL COACTUPC
checks.details: View/update mode toggle matches PF-key behavior. Validation rules match COBOL paragraph EDIT-ACCT-DATA. Error messages aligned with original SEND MAP messages
Sealed interface for account status, record DTO, service layer encapsulates business rules, 91% line coverage
